issues.comment: Prisma's `updateMany` with an empty `data: {}` object is a no-op — no SQL UPDATE is generated, and the `@updatedAt` directive does not fire because there are no actual field changes to apply. The intent is to update `SelectedCalendar.updatedAt` for all calendars under the credential, but this will never happen. Fix: pass an explicit timestamp, e.g. `{ updatedAt: new Date() }`.

`sed -i ''` syntax is macOS/BSD-only. On GNU/Linux, `sed -i` does not take a separate backup extension argument — the `''` would be interpreted as a filename, causing the command to fail with an error. The script will fail on Linux, which is the typical CI/server environment.
